summary: Copy Subset from Standard Cost Code List
description: Copy a subset of Cost Codes from Standard Cost Code List.

201.description: All of the Standard Cost Codes in the subset were copied successfully

successes.description: Array of successfully created Cost Codes

207.description: Only part of the Standard Cost Codes subset was copied successfully

standard_cost_code_list_id.description: The ID of the standard cost code list id

standard_cost_code_ids.description: A list of the standard cost code ids to add to biller (must include the ancestors of any standard cost code in this list)

sub_job_id.description: The ID of the subjob biller

project_id.description: The ID of the project biller
